word: G1633 - ἐκχωρέω - ekchōréō - ek-kho-reh'-o - Depart out

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐκχωρέω

- Transliteration: Ekchoreo

- Phonetic: ek-kho-reh'-o

- Definition:

1. to depart from

2. to remove from in the sense of fleeing from

- Origin: from G1537 and G5562

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G5562; to depart: - depart out.
